        "contents": "\n\nexport class CloudSyncManager implements vscode.UriHandler {\n    private context: vscode.ExtensionContext;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private statusBarItem: vscode.StatusBarItem;\n    private pendingAuth: ((token: string) => void) | null = null;\n\n    private static readonly TOKEN_KEY = 'cloudSync.token';\n    private static readonly USER_KEY = 'cloudSync.user';\n    private static readonly STATE_KEY = 'cloudSync.authState';\n    private static readonly OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://api.llmchathistory.com'; // 官方服务器地址\n\n    constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.context = context;\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.statusBarItem = vscode.window.createStatusBarItem(vscode.StatusBarAlignment.Right, 100);\n        this.statusBarItem.command = 'chatHistory.cloudLogin';\n        this.updateStatusBar();\n        this.statusBarItem.show();\n        context.subscriptions.push(this.statusBarItem);\n        \n        // 注册 URI Handler 用于接收浏览器回调\n        context.subscriptions.push(vscode.window.registerUriHandler(this));\n    }",

_2025-12-26 03:58Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> 我找到了插件请求的API地址配置。让我总结一下：
>
> 1. 在 `src/cloud/cloud-sync.ts` 第60行定义了官方服务器地址：
>    - `OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://api.llmchathistory.com'`
>
> 2. 在 `src/telemetry/telemetry.ts` 第92行也定义了同样的地址：
>    - `OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://api.llmchathistory.com'`
>
> 3. 有一个调试模式可以使用自定义服务器地址：
>    - 配置项 `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode` 为 true 时
>    - 使用 `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl` 配置的地址
>
> 所以默认情况下，插件请求的API地址是 `https://api.llmchathistory.com`

</details>

## 🤖 Assistant #5 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 03:58Z_

根据代码，插件请求的 API 地址配置如下：

## 官方服务器地址

```60:60:src/cloud/cloud-sync.ts
    private static readonly OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://api.llmchathistory.com'; // 官方服务器地址
```

同样在遥测模块中也有定义：

```92:92:src/telemetry/telemetry.ts
    private static readonly OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://api.llmchathistory.com';
```

## 调试模式

插件支持调试模式，可以使用自定义服务器地址：

```136:149:src/cloud/cloud-sync.ts
    private getServerUrl(): string {
        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');
        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);
        
        if (debugMode) {
            const debugUrl = config.get<string>('cloudSync.debugServerUrl', '');
            if (debugUrl) {
                console.log('[CloudSync] Debug mode enabled, using custom server:', debugUrl);
                return debugUrl;
            }
        }
        
        return CloudSyncManager.OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL;
    }
```

**总结：**
- **默认 API 地址**: `https://api.llmchathistory.com`
- **调试模式**: 可通过设置 `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode` 为 `true`，然后配置 `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl` 使用自定义地址

Error('Failed to parse response'));\n                        }\n                    });\n                }\n            );\n\n            req.on('error', reject);\n\n            if (requestBody) {\n                req.write(requestBody);\n            }\n            req.end();\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Login via browser (OAuth flow)\n     */\n    async loginWithBrowser(mode: 'login' | 'register' = 'login'): Promise<void> {\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n        \n        // 生成随机 state 防止 CSRF\n        const state = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.STATE_KEY, state);\n\n        // 构建回调 URI\n        const callbackUri = vscode.Uri.parse(`${vscode.env.uriScheme}://ClarkZhang.llm-chat-history/auth-callback`);\n        \n        // 构建登录/注册 URL\n        const authUrl = `${serverUrl}/auth/${mode}?state=${state}&redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(callbackUri.toString())}`;\n        \n        console.log('[CloudSync] Opening browser for authentication...');\n        console.log('[CloudSync] Auth URL:', authUrl);\n        console.log('[CloudSync] Callback URI:', callbackUri.toString());\n        \n        // 在浏览器中打开\n        await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(authUrl));\n        \n        // 显示等待提示\n        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n            'Please complete the authentication in your browser.',\n            'Cancel'\n        );\n    }\n\n\n    /**\n     * Logout from cloud\n     */\n    async logout(): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        const user = this.getUser();\n        \n        if (token) {\n            try {\n                await this.request('POST', '/api/auth/logout', undefined, token);\n            } catch (e) {\n                // Ignore logout errors\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 上报登出事件\n        this.trackTelemetryEvent(TelemetryEvents.USER_LOGGED_OUT, {\n            user_id: user?.id,\n        });\n\n        await this.clearAuth();\n        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(this.t('cloud.logoutSuccess'));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Sync sessions to cloud\n     */\n    async syncSessions(source: string, sessions: SyncSession[]): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            throw new Error('Not logged in');\n        }\n\n        if (sessions.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const syncRequest: SyncRequest = {\n            source,\n            sessions,\n        };\n\n        await this.request<{ message: string }>('POST', '/api/chat/sync', syncRequest, token);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Convert Message array to SyncMessage array\n     */\n    convertMessages(messages: Message[]): SyncMessage[] {\n        return messages.map((msg) => ({\n            type: msg.type,\n            content: msg.text,\n            thinking: msg.thinking,\n            timestamp: msg.timestamp,\n            model_name: msg.modelName,\n            mode: msg.mode,\n            context: msg.context ? JSON.stringify(msg.context) : undefined,\n            tool_results: msg.toolResults ? JSON.stringify(msg.toolResults) : undefined,\n            tool_uses: msg.toolUses ? JSON.stringify(msg.toolUses) : undefined,\n            images: msg.images ? JSON.stringify(msg.images) : undefined,\n        }));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Validate token with server\n     */\n    async validateToken(showNotification: boolean = false): Promise<boolean> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            await this.request<{ user: CloudUser }>('GET', '/api/user/profile', undefined, token);\n            if (showNotification) {\n                vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Cloud sync is active and working');\n            }\n            return true;\n        } catch (e) {\n            // Token invalid, clear it\n            await this.clearAuth();\n            if (showNotification) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your login session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        this.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get cloud sync status information\n     */\n    getStatusInfo(): { status: string; message: string; details: string } {\n        const user = this.getUser();\n        const isEnabled = this.isEnabled();\n        const isLoggedIn = this.isLoggedIn();\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n\n        if (isLoggedIn && isEnabled) {\n            return {\n                status: '✅ Active',\n                message: `Logged in as ${user?.username}`,\n                details: `Cloud sync is enabled and active.\\nServer: ${serverUrl}${debugMode ? ' (Debug Mode)' : ''}\\nAuto sync: ${this.isAutoSyncEnabled() ? 'On' : 'Off'}`\n            };\n        } else if (isLoggedIn && !isEnabled) {\n            return {\n                status: '⏸️ Paused',\n                message: `Logged in as ${user?.username}`,\n                details: 'Cloud sync is disabled. Enable it in settings to start syncing.'\n            };\n        } else if (!isLoggedIn && isEnabled) {\n            return {\n                status: '⚠️ Not Logged In',\n                message: 'Cloud sync enabled but not logged in',\n                details: 'Please login to start syncing your chat history.'\n            };\n        } else {\n            return {\n                status: '⭕ Disabled',\n                message: 'Cloud sync is not enabled',\n                details: 'Enable cloud sync in settings and login to start syncing.'\n            };\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get translator\n     */\n    getTranslator(): Translator {\n        return this.t;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Track telemetry event\n     */\n    private trackTelemetryEvent(eventName: string, eventData?: Record<string, any>): void {\n        try {\n            const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n            if (telemetry) {\n                telemetry.trackEvent(eventName as any, eventData);\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Failed to track telemetry event:', error);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

const events = [...this.eventQueue];\n        this.eventQueue = [];\n\n        const payload = {\n            ...this.telemetryContext,\n            events: events.map(e => ({\n this.request('POST', '/api/telemetry/events', payload);\n            console.log('[Telemetry] Batch sent:', events.length, 'events');\n        } catch (error) {\n            // 发送失败，重新加入队列\n /**\n     * 启动定时刷新\n     */\n    private startFlushTimer(): void {\n        if (this.flushTimer) {\n            clearInterval(this.flushTimer);\n        }\n        this.flushTimer = setInterval(() => {\n            this.flush();\n        }, TelemetryManager.FLUSH_INTERVAL);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止定时刷新\n     */\n    private stopFlushTimer(): void {\n        if (this.flushTimer) {\n            clearInterval(this.flushTimer);\n            this.flushTimer = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 检查遥测是否启用\n     */\n    private isEnabled(): boolean {\n        // 检查 VS Code 全局遥测设置\n        const vscodeTelemetry = vscode.env.isTelemetryEnabled;\n        if (!vscodeTelemetry) {\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        // 检查插件自己的遥测设置（可选，暂未添加配置项）\n        // const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        // return config.get<boolean>('telemetry.enabled', true);\n\n        return true;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取服务器 URL\n     */\n    private getServerUrl(): string {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n\n        if (debugMode) {\n            const debugUrl = config.get<string>('cloudSync.debugServerUrl', '');\n            if (debugUrl) {\n                return debugUrl;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return TelemetryManager.OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 发送 HTTP 请求\n     */\n    private async request<T>(method: string, path: string, body?: any): Promise<T> {\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n        const url = new URL(path, serverUrl);\n        const isHttps = url.protocol === 'https:';\n        const httpModule = isHttps ? https : http;\n\n        const headers: Record<string, string> = {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        };\n\n        const requestBody = body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined;\n\n        return new Promise<T>((resolve, reject) => {\n            const req = httpModule.request(\n                {\n                    hostname: url.hostname,\n                    port: url.port || (isHttps ? 443 : 80),\n                    path: url.pathname + url.search,\n                    method,\n                    headers,\n                    timeout: 10000, // 10秒超时\n                },\n                (res) => {\n                    let data = '';\n                    res.on('data', (chunk) => (data += chunk));\n                    res.on('end', () => {\n                        try {\n                            const json = JSON.parse(data);\n                            if (res.statusCode && res.statusCode >= 200 && res.statusCode < 300) {\n                                resolve(json as T);\n                            } else {\n                                reject(new Error(json.error || `Request failed with status ${res.statusCode}`));\n                            }\n                        } catch (e) {\n                            reject(new Error('Failed to parse response'));\n                        }\n                    });\n                }\n            );\n\n            req.on('error', reject);\n            req.on('timeout', () => {\n                req.destroy();\n                reject(new Error('Request timeout'));\n            });\n\n            if (requestBody) {\n                req.write(requestBody);\n            }\n            req.end();\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 销毁管理器\n     */\n    async dispose(): Promise<void> {\n        this.stopFlushTimer();\n        // 发送剩余事件\n        await this.flush();\n        TelemetryManager.instance = null;\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 便捷方法：上报事件\n */\nexport function trackEvent(eventName: TelemetryEventName, eventData?: Record<string, any>): void {\n    const telemetry = getTelemetry();\n    if (telemetry) {\n        telemetry.trackEvent(eventName, eventData);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 便捷方法：上报事件（仅登录用户）\n */\nexport function trackEventIfLoggedIn(eventName: TelemetryEventName, eventData?: Record<string, any>): void {\n trackError(errorType: string, errorMessage: string, source?: string): void {\n    const telemetry = getTelemetry();\n    if (telemetry) {\n        telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.ERROR_OCCURRED,         },
        "contents": "export class ClineWatcher {\n\n    \n    ...\n\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行同步\n     */\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }",
        "originalContents": "\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行同步\n     */\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }",

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/agents/cursor/cursor-database-watcher.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          }
        },
        "contents": "export class DatabaseWatcher {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}",
        "originalContents": "\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/extension.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

        },
        "contents": "export async function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\n\n    ...\n\n    if (fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Kilo storage found, starting Kilo watcher');\n        const kiloWatcher = new KiloWatcher(kiloStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        kiloWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(kiloWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Kilo storage not found:', kiloStoragePath);\n    }\n    \n    // 如果没有找到任何聊天历史\n    if (watchers.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No chat history sources found (Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo)');\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: No supported AI plugins found. Please install and use Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo.'\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 上报插件激活事件\n    telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_ACTIVATED, {\n        watchers_count: watchers.length,\n        cursor_found: fs.existsSync(cursorDbPath),\n        cline_found: fs.existsSync(clineStoragePath),\n        blackbox_found: fs.existsSync(blackboxStoragePath),\n        kilo_found: fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath),\n        cloud_sync_enabled: config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false),\n        auto_save_enabled: autoSave,\n    });\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            // 上报手动保存事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SAVE_TRIGGERED);\n            \n            for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                watcher.syncNow();\n            }\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：搜索聊天历史\n    const searchCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.search',\n        () => {\n            showSearchInterface(context);\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 初始化云端同步管理器\n    const cloudSync = new CloudSyncManager(context, localeSetting);",
        "originalContents": "\n    if (fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Kilo storage found, starting Kilo watcher');\n        const kiloWatcher = new KiloWatcher(kiloStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        kiloWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(kiloWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Kilo storage not found:', kiloStoragePath);\n    }\n    \n    // 如果没有找到任何聊天历史\n    if (watchers.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No chat history sources found (Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo)');\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: No supported AI plugins found. Please install and use Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo.'\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 上报插件激活事件\n    telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_ACTIVATED, {\n        watchers_count: watchers.length,\n        cursor_found: fs.existsSync(cursorDbPath),\n        cline_found: fs.existsSync(clineStoragePath),\n        blackbox_found: fs.existsSync(blackboxStoragePath),\n        kilo_found: fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath),\n        cloud_sync_enabled: config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false),\n        auto_save_enabled: autoSave,\n    });\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            // 上报手动保存事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SAVE_TRIGGERED);\n            \n            for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                watcher.syncNow();\n            }\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：搜索聊天历史\n    const searchCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.search',\n        () => {\n            showSearchInterface(context);\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 初始化云端同步管理器\n    const cloudSync = new CloudSyncManager(context, localeSetting);",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "export class KiloWatcher {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[Kilo] Starting sync');\n        const reader = new KiloReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Kilo] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[Kilo] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                console.log(`[Kilo] 🔍 Checking conversation: ${conversation.id} - ${conversation.title}`);\n\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Workspace filter result: ${belongsToWorkspace}`);\n\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⏭️ Skipping conversation ${conversation.id} - not in current workspace`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                console.log(`[Kilo] ✅ Processing conversation: ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                const builder = new KiloConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Built ${messages.length} messages for conversation ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⚠️ No messages in conversation ${conversation.id}, skipping`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new KiloMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');",

        "contents": "export class BlackboxWatcher {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting sync');\n        const reader = new BlackboxReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const builder = new BlackboxConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new BlackboxMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'blackboxai');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }",
        "originalContents": "\n\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting sync');\n        const reader = new BlackboxReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const builder = new BlackboxConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new BlackboxMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'blackboxai');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }",

        "contents": "\n\nexport class CloudSyncManager implements vscode.UriHandler {\n    private context: vscode.ExtensionContext;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private statusBarItem: vscode.StatusBarItem;\n    private pendingAuth: ((token: string) => void) | null = null;\n\n    private static readonly TOKEN_KEY = 'cloudSync.token';\n    private static readonly USER_KEY = 'cloudSync.user';\n    private static readonly STATE_KEY = 'cloudSync.authState';\n    private static readonly OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://llm-chat-history.com'; // 官方服务器地址\n\n    constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.context = context;\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.statusBarItem = vscode.window.createStatusBarItem(vscode.StatusBarAlignment.Right, 100);\n        this.statusBarItem.command = 'chatHistory.cloudLogin';\n        this.updateStatusBar();\n        this.statusBarItem.show();\n        context.subscriptions.push(this.statusBarItem);\n        \n        // 注册 URI Handler 用于接收浏览器回调\n        context.subscriptions.push(vscode.window.registerUriHandler(this));\n    }",

        "contents": "export class CloudSyncManager implements vscode.UriHandler {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    /**\n     * Sync sessions to cloud\n     */\n    async syncSessions(source: string, sessions: SyncSession[]): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            throw new Error('Not logged in');\n        }\n\n        if (sessions.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const syncRequest: SyncRequest = {\n            source,\n            sessions,\n        };\n\n        await this.request<{ message: string }>('POST', '/api/chat/sync', syncRequest, token);\n    }",

        "contents": "/**\n * Cline 文件监听器\n * 监听 Cline 任务文件变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ClineReader } from './cline-reader';\nimport { ClineConversationBuilder } from './cline-conversation-builder';\nimport { ClineMarkdownGenerator } from './cline-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { ClineWorkspaceFilter } from './cline-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport class ClineWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: ClineWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    \n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new ClineWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }",
        "originalContents": "/**\n * Cline 文件监听器\n * 监听 Cline 任务文件变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ClineReader } from './cline-reader';\nimport { ClineConversationBuilder } from './cline-conversation-builder';\nimport { ClineMarkdownGenerator } from './cline-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { ClineWorkspaceFilter } from './cline-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport class ClineWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: ClineWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    \n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new ClineWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Cline 文件监听器",
            "lineNumber": 2

          {

            "lineNumber": 3

          {
            "text": "import * as chokidar from 'chokidar';",

            "lineNumber": 7

          {
            "text": "import { ClineReader } from './cline-reader';",
            "lineNumber": 9

          {
            "text": "import { ClineConversationBuilder } from './cline-conversation-builder';",
            "lineNumber": 10

{
  "contents": "/**\n * 历史记录保存器\n * 负责将 Markdown 内容保存到文件系统\n */\n\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ComposerData } from './types';\nimport { trackEventIfLoggedIn, TelemetryEvents } from './telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport class HistorySaver {\n    private historyDir: string;\n    private source: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history/history', source: string = 'unknown') {\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\n        this.source = source;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 保存对话到文件\n     */\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\n        // 确保目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\n\n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n\n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n\n        if (shouldSave) {\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n            \n            // 上报文件保存事件（仅登录用户）\n            trackEventIfLoggedIn(TelemetryEvents.FILE_SAVED_LOCALLY, {\n                source: this.source,\n                session_id: composer.composerId,\n            });\n        }\n\n        return filepath;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成文件名\n     */\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\n        \n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\n     */\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\n        // 移除特殊字符\n        return title\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\n            .toLowerCase()\n            .substring(0, 50);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 检查是否需要保存\n     */\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\n        try {\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\n        } catch {\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

}
